title: Obsidian Equipment Reworked
description: A fork of Exlines' Obsidian Equipment mod! With more features and fixes!
body:
# Obsidian Equipment Reworked

A Fabric mod that adds a full set of **Obsidian equipment** to Minecraft, filling the gap between Diamond and Netherite. Craft powerful tools and armor from Obsidian Ingots — a new material blasted from obsidian.
## Getting Started

### Obtaining Obsidian Ingots

Obsidian Ingots are obtained by **blasting Obsidian** in a Blast Furnace.

![Obsidian Ingot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc642c86d9775c2e77408429c4b7abdea849b4e8.png)

### Crafting

All tools and armor follow **standard vanilla crafting recipes**, using Obsidian Ingots in place of the material (and sticks for tool handles). If you know how to craft Diamond gear, you know how to craft Obsidian gear.

![Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1f268b00a7046314a7e9162563d8744846d17aa.gif)

### Horse Armor

Obsidian Horse Armor cannot be crafted — it can only be found as **rare loot** in a Nether Fortress, as Bastion Treasure, and Ruined Portal chests (18% chance).

### Spear (1.21.11+)

The Obsidian Spear is crafted with the standard diagonal spear recipe using Obsidian Ingots. It sits between Diamond and Netherite in charge damage, knockback, and swing speed.

### Nautilus Armor (1.21.11+)

Obsidian Nautilus Armor is rare loot found in **Shipwreck Supply chests**, **Ocean Ruin chests**, and **Buried Treasure.** It provides **15 body armor points** (Diamond: 11, Netherite: 19).

Obsidian Nautilus Armor replaces Diamond as the base for upgrading to Netherite Nautilus Armor at the Smithing Table. It can also be smelted down into an Obsidian Ingot.

## Stats

Obsidian equipment sits **between Diamond and Netherite** in power, making it a natural progression step.

### Tool Stats

| Stat | Diamond | Obsidian | Netherite |
|---|---|---|---|
| Durability | 1561 | **1800** | 2031 |
| Mining Speed | 8.0 | **8.7** | 9.0 |
| Mining Level | 3 | **4** | 4 |
| Enchantability | 10 | **12** | 15 |

### Tool Attack Damage

| Tool | Diamond | Obsidian | Netherite |
|---|---|---|---|
| Sword | 7 | **7.5** | 8 |
| Axe | 9 | **9.5** | 10 |
| Pickaxe | 5 | **5.5** | 6 |
| Shovel | 5.5 | **6** | 6.5 |
| Hoe | 1 | **2.5** | 1 |

### Armor Protection

| Piece | Diamond | Obsidian | Netherite |
|---|---|---|---|
| Helmet | 3 | **3** | 3 |
| Chestplate | 8 | **8** | 8 |
| Leggings | 6 | **6** | 6 |
| Boots | 3 | **3** | 3 |
| **Total** | **20** | **20** | **20** |

### Armor Durability

| Piece | Diamond | Obsidian | Netherite |
|---|---|---|---|
| Helmet | 363 | **385** | 407 |
| Chestplate | 528 | **560** | 592 |
| Leggings | 495 | **525** | 555 |
| Boots | 429 | **455** | 481 |

### Armor Attributes

| Stat | Diamond | Obsidian | Netherite |
|---|---|---|---|
| Toughness | 2.0 | **2.5** | 3.0 |
| Knockback Resistance | 0 | **0.05** | 0.1 |
| Enchantability | 10 | **12** | 15 |

### Nautilus Armor Protection (1.21.11+)

| Stat | Diamond | Obsidian | Netherite |
|---|---|---|---|
| Body Armor | 11 | **15** | 19 |

## Supported Versions

- Minecraft 1.20.1 – 1.21.11 (Fabric)
- Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
